caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black gaming headset with a microphone is positioned in front of a plain, light-colored wall. In the first scene, he is speaking with his mouth open and both hands raised and open in an expressive gesture. In the following scene, he continues to speak, with his right hand lifted and fingers slightly curled. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hands and remains focused forward while speaking. In the final scene, he continues to talk, raising both hands again, with his right hand slightly higher than his left. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the bottom left corner of each shot. The lighting is consistent across the scenes, and the man remains centered in the frame throughout the progression.
